# Cultivate Wellness Chiropractic

> Experts in Drug-Free Pediatric, Prenatal, and Family Health Care in Rochester Hills, MI

## About This Practice

Cultivate Wellness Chiropractic is a neurologically-focused chiropractic practice in Rochester Hills, Michigan, specializing in pediatric, prenatal, and family wellness care. Led by Dr. Zach Conner, DC — one of only two certified teachers of Talsky Tonal Chiropractic worldwide — the practice provides gentle, effective care that respects the body's innate intelligence using objective nervous system measurement with INSiGHT scanning technology.

**Important Update:** Dr. Zach has merged practices with Van Every Family Chiropractic Center in Royal Oak, MI. New patient appointments are now scheduled at the new location.

## Contact Information

- **Practice Name:** Cultivate Wellness Chiropractic
- **Doctor:** Dr. Zach Conner, DC (Doctor of Chiropractic, Life University)
- **Address:** 1460 Walton Blvd., Ste. 210, Rochester Hills, MI 48309
- **Phone:** (248) 221-1118
- **Email:** info@cultivatewellnesschiro.com
- **Website:** https://www.cultivatewellnesschiro.com
- **Hours:** Friday 3:00–6:30 PM, Saturday 8:00 AM–1:00 PM
- **New Patient Bookings:** https://cultivatewellnesschiro.janeapp.com/
- **New Patient Location (Van Every):** 4203 Rochester Rd, Royal Oak, MI 48073 — (248) 616-0900

## Doctor Profile

- **Full Name:** Dr. Zach Conner, DC
- **Title:** Neurologically-Focused Chiropractor
- **Education:** Doctor of Chiropractic, Life University College of Chiropractic
- **Certifications:** ICPA Webster Technique Certification
- **Specialties:** Pediatric Chiropractic, Prenatal Chiropractic, Talsky Tonal Chiropractic, INSiGHT Scans, Webster Technique, Neurological Development, Family Wellness
- **Distinction:** One of only two certified teachers of Talsky Tonal Chiropractic worldwide
- **Special Expertise:** Children with special needs — autism, ADHD, sensory processing, developmental challenges

## Core Services

### Pediatric Chiropractic Care
Specialized care for infants and children from birth through adolescence. We address colic and reflux in infants, sleep difficulties and developmental challenges, sensory processing and spectrum challenges (autism, ADHD), ear infections and immune support, growing pains, scoliosis, and posture issues.

### Prenatal Chiropractic Care
Safe, gentle care for expectant mothers including the Webster Technique for optimal pelvic balance, relief from pregnancy discomfort (back pain, sciatica), support for optimal fetal positioning, preparation for easier labor and delivery, and postpartum recovery support.

### Family Chiropractic Care
Whole-family wellness care for all ages — from newborns to grandparents — including preventative wellness maintenance, natural pain relief without drugs or surgery, athletic performance optimization, and stress reduction and nervous system support.

## Our Approach

### Talsky Tonal Chiropractic
A paradigm shift in chiropractic care developed by Dr. Marvin Talsky in 2001. This gentle, neurologically-focused technique uses a vitalistic, moment-to-moment analysis to identify tension patterns, releases accumulated stress ("stress stuck on"), restores nervous system integrity without bone cracking, and facilitates never-ending optimization with continued care. Dr. Zach is one of two certified teachers of this technique worldwide.

### INSiGHT Scanning Technology
State-of-the-art, non-invasive nervous system assessment using three scans:
- **neuroTHERMAL Scan:** Evaluates subluxation and dysautonomia via spinal temperature patterns
- **neuroCORE (sEMG) Scan:** Detects neuromotor challenges and muscle tension patterns
- **neuroPULSE (HRV) Scan:** Measures stress adaptability and nervous system balance
- **CORE Score:** Comprehensive neural efficiency index combining all three scans

## Key Practice Facts

- Founded: 2020
- Location: Rochester Hills, MI (Oakland County)
- Serving: Rochester Hills, Royal Oak, Troy, Auburn Hills, Shelby Township, and surrounding areas
- Member of the International Chiropractic Pediatric Association (ICPA)
- Evidence-based care using objective nervous system measurements
- Special expertise with children with special needs
- Pricing: $$

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Is chiropractic safe for infants?**
Yes, pediatric chiropractic uses extremely gentle techniques — about the pressure used to test a tomato for ripeness. No cracking or manipulation.

**What is the Webster Technique?**
A specific chiropractic analysis that optimizes pelvic balance during pregnancy, supporting optimal fetal positioning. Dr. Zach is ICPA Webster Certified.

**How is Talsky Tonal different from traditional chiropractic?**
No bone cracking or forceful manipulation. A non-manipulative approach using gentle pressure input with a finger contact and a vitalistic, moment-to-moment analysis to release tension patterns in the nervous system. Corrections continue working with your body's movements and breathing.

**What conditions can pediatric chiropractic help?**
Colic, reflux, sleep issues, ear infections, developmental delays, sensory processing challenges, focus issues, ADHD, autism spectrum, torticollis, plagiocephaly, and general wellness.

**What are INSiGHT scans?**
Non-invasive, non-radiating neurological assessments using surface sensors. Safe for all ages — from newborns to seniors — with no needles, no radiation, and no discomfort.
